theme: Giving a product demo to a customer

vocab.example: Let me walk you through the main features first.
vocab.example_vi: Để tôi hướng dẫn bạn qua các tính năng chính trước.

vocab.example: You can see all your sales data on this dashboard.
vocab.example_vi: Bạn có thể xem toàn bộ dữ liệu bán hàng trên bảng điều khiển này.

vocab.example: We can set you up with a free trial version.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng tôi có thể cho bạn dùng thử miễn phí.

vocab.example: This feature lets you export reports automatically.
vocab.example_vi: Tính năng này giúp bạn xuất báo cáo tự động.

vocab.example: Our customers say the app is very user-friendly.
vocab.example_vi: Khách hàng của chúng tôi nói ứng dụng rất dễ dùng.

vocab.example: It can integrate with the accounting system you already use.
vocab.example_vi: Nó có thể tích hợp với hệ thống kế toán bạn đang dùng.

vocab.example: You can customize the dashboard for each department.
vocab.example_vi: Bạn có thể tuỳ chỉnh bảng điều khiển cho từng phòng ban.

vocab.example: Let's go through the setup step by step.
vocab.example_vi: Hãy cùng thực hiện cài đặt từng bước một.

listening.title: Showing the product to a client

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Thanks for joining today. I'll walk you through our software step by step.

lines.speaker: Duc
lines.text: Sounds good. Can it integrate with our current accounting system?

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Yes, it can. Here's the dashboard — you can see sales, stock, and reports in one place.

lines.speaker: Duc
lines.text: This looks quite user-friendly. Can we customize it for our own team?

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Absolutely, every feature on this dashboard can be customized later.

lines.speaker: Duc
lines.text: Great. Is there a trial version we can test before we buy it?

lines.speaker: Hoa
lines.text: Of course, we offer a two-week trial version with full features.

lines.speaker: Duc
lines.text: Perfect, let's start with that trial then.

questions.q: What does Duc ask if the software can do with their accounting system?
How does Duc describe the dashboard?
How long is the trial version Hoa offers?

shadowing: Let me walk you through the main features first, and then you can ask questions.
You can customize the dashboard for your own team once you're set up.
Is there a free trial version we can test before we commit to buying?
This software can integrate with your current system without any extra setup.
Our customers say the app is very user-friendly, even for beginners.
